content: Hi, I'm Logan and I'm a physical therapist specializing in sports injuries. I've been working in Phoenix, AZ for the past 5 years.
Hi Logan! It's nice to meet you. What do you like to do in your free time?

I love hiking and trying out new outdoor activities. I've also recently taken up archery and I'm really enjoying it. I've been thinking of getting a dog to join me on my hikes, maybe a golden retriever.
That sounds like a great idea! Dogs can be wonderful companions for outdoor activities. Have you thought about how you'll balance your work and school schedule with having a new pet?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that a lot. I'm currently finishing up my part-time MBA and I'm hoping to graduate by the end of the year, so I'll need to make sure I have enough time for my new pet. I'm planning to take a trip to Denver, CO on August 20th to visit my friend, Rachel.
That's a great goal! It's impressive that you're pursuing your MBA while working full-time. How do you like to relax and unwind after a long day of work and studying?
I love knitting and listening to music. It's a great way for me to clear my mind and express myself creatively. I've also been getting into coffee brewing and I find it really relaxing.
That sounds like a great hobby! Have you thought about combining your love of animals and outdoor activities in any way, maybe through a volunteer program or event?

Actually, that's not a bad idea. I've been thinking about volunteering at a local animal shelter and I could take my new dog with me. I've been talking to my colleague, Michael, about helping me find a shelter to volunteer at.
That's a wonderful idea! I'm sure it will be a great way for you to give back to the community and spend time with your new pet. What kind of dog are you thinking of getting?
I'm thinking of getting a golden retriever. I've always loved their friendly and energetic personalities. I'm planning to visit the shelter on September 1st to start looking for a new furry friend.
